articles.author: Elsa Ohlen
articles.title: 'NATO 3.0': Defense spending pledges face the Trump test - CNBC
articles.description: Leaders are expected to focus on whether Europe can turn higher defense spending into military power as Washington pushes allies to shoulder more of the burden.
articles.content:
NATO faces a crucial test of its credibility and future viability this week as leaders meet in Turkey, with new European defense spending targets under unprecedented scrutiny from the White House.
